neighborhoods.name: Centro
neighborhoods.description: Compact downtown with Bolivar Plaza, commercial streets, and the Egoya viaduct connecting to Dosquebradas
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Pereira. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Cerritos
neighborhoods.description: Upscale residential area with country clubs, gated communities, and views of the coffee-growing countryside
neighborhoods.character: Semi-rural upscale, country clubs, quiet living

housing.predominantType: Gated community houses and modern villas

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Pereira's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Cuba
neighborhoods.description: Western working-class district with affordable housing, local markets, and improving transit connections

housing.predominantType: Social housing blocks and modest houses

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Pinares de San Martin
neighborhoods.description: Modern upscale residential area near Circunvalar avenue with shopping malls and restaurants

housing.predominantType: Modern apartment towers and townhouse complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
